Title: Successful Login as Client
Preconditions: User has registered as a Client.
Test Steps:
1. Enter username "testclient" in the login form.
2. Enter password "testpassword" in the password field.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: The system should return the user data and allow the user to access the application.

Title: Failed Login due to Incorrect Password
Preconditions: User has registered as a Client.
Test Steps:
1. Enter username "testclient" in the login form.
2. Enter password "wrongpassword" in the password field.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: The system should display an error message indicating incorrect login credentials.

Title: Failed Login due to Non-Existent User
Preconditions: User has not registered yet.
Test Steps:
1. Enter username "nonexistentuser" in the login form.
2. Enter password "testpassword" in the password field.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: The system should display an error message indicating that the user does not exist.

Title: Modify Product with Correct Fields
Preconditions: User is logged in as a Vendor.
Test Data: Product Name: New Product, Price: 19.99, Description: This is a new product.
Test Steps:
1. Click on a product.
2. Click the "Modify" button.
3. Fill in the product details: Name, Price, Description.
4. Click the "Apply" button.
Expected Result: The system should update the product details and reflect the changes.

Title: Modify Product with Incorrect Fields
Preconditions: User is logged in as a Vendor.
Test Data: Product Name: , Price: 19.99, Description: This is a new product.
Test Steps:
1. Click on a product.
2. Click the "Modify" button.
3. Fill in the product details: Name, Price, Description.
4. Click the "Apply" button.
Expected Result: The system should display an error message indicating that the fields are not correctly filled.

Title: Add Product with Correct Fields
Preconditions: User is logged in as a Vendor.
Test Data: Product Name: New Product, Price: 19.99, Description: This is a new product.
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Add Product" button.
2. Fill in the product details: Name, Price, Description.
3. Click the "Add" button.
Expected Result: The system should add the product and display a confirmation message.

Test Steps:
1. Click the "Add Product" button.

Title: Send Push Notification
Preconditions: User is logged in as a Vendor.
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Push Notification" button.
2. Confirm the notification settings.
Expected Result: The system should send a push notification to the user's device.

Title: Send In-App Notification
Preconditions: User is logged in as a Vendor.
Test Steps:
1. Click the "In-App Notification" button.
2. Confirm the notification settings.
Expected Result: The system should send an in-app notification to the user.

Title: Send Push Notification with Invalid Settings
Preconditions: User is logged in as a Vendor.
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Push Notification" button.
2. Enter invalid settings.
Expected Result: The system should display an error message indicating invalid settings.

Title: Send In-App Notification with Invalid Settings
Preconditions: User is logged in as a Vendor.
Test Steps:
1. Click the "In-App Notification" button.
2. Enter invalid settings.
Expected Result: The system should display an error message indicating invalid settings.

Title: Mark Vendor as Preferred
Preconditions: User is logged in as a Client.
Test Steps:
1. Select a vendor from the list.
2. Click the "Mark as Preferred" button.
Expected Result: The system should mark the selected vendor as a preferred vendor for the user.

Title: Unmark Vendor as Preferred
Preconditions: User has marked a vendor as preferred.
Test Steps:
1. Select the preferred vendor from the list.
2. Click the "Unmark as Preferred" button.
Expected Result: The system should unmark the selected vendor as a preferred vendor for the user.

Title: Mark Vendor as Preferred with Invalid Vendor ID
Preconditions: User is logged in as a Client.
Test Steps:
1. Enter an invalid vendor ID.
2. Click the "Mark as Preferred" button.
Expected Result: The system should display an error message indicating an invalid vendor ID.

Title: Unmark Vendor as Preferred with Invalid Vendor ID
Preconditions: User has marked a vendor as preferred.
Test Steps:
1. Enter an invalid vendor ID.
2. Click the "Unmark as Preferred" button.
Expected Result: The system should display an error message indicating an invalid vendor ID.

Title: Create User Account
Preconditions: System is ready to accept new user registrations.
Test Data: Username: testuser, Password: testpassword, Email: test@example.com
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Register" button.
2. Fill in the registration form with the provided data.
3. Click the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: The system should create a new user account and redirect the user to the login page.

Title: Create User Account with Existing Username
Preconditions: System is ready to accept new user registrations.
Test Data: Username: testuser, Password: testpassword, Email: test@example.com
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Register" button.
2. Fill in the registration form with the provided data.
3. Click the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: The system should display an error message indicating that the username already exists.

Title: Create User Account with Invalid Email
Preconditions: System is ready to accept new user registrations.
Test Data: Username: testuser, Password: testpassword, Email: invalidemail
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Register" button.
2. Fill in the registration form with the provided data.
3. Click the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: The system should display an error message indicating that the email is invalid.

Title: Create User Account with Empty Fields
Preconditions: System is ready to accept new user registrations.
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Register" button.
2. Fill in the registration form with empty fields.
3. Click the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: The system should display an error message indicating that all fields are required.

Title: Logout Successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps: 1. Click the "Logout" button.
Expected Result: The system should log out the user and redirect them to the login page.

Title: Attempt to Logout Without Being Logged In
Preconditions: User is not logged in.
Test Steps: 1. Click the "Logout" button.
Expected Result: The system should display an error message indicating that the user is not logged in.
